# Pull Request

## 🗒️ Description
A clear and concise description of the changes you've made.

## 🔗 Related Issue
- Closes #[issue-number]
- Fixes #[issue-number]

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration/infrastructure change
- [ ] Test addition or improvement

## 🧪 Testing Done
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Backend unit tests pass
- [ ] Frontend unit tests pass
- [ ] Contract tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## 🔒 Security Checklist
- [ ] Input validation has been considered
- [ ] No sensitive data is logged or exposed
- [ ] Dependencies have not introduced new vulnerabilities
- [ ] Error messages do not leak internal details

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the existing style and patterns of the project
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`npm run test`)
- [ ] My PR has a descriptive title
- [ ] I have run linting and type-checking locally

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add any visual changes here to help reviewers.
